description: Retrieve a paginated list of all Wifi Broadcasts on a site.

children.name: metadata
children.type: object (User or derived or orchestrated entity metadata)

children.name: broadcastingDeviceFilter
children.description: Defines the custom scope of devices that will broadcast this WiFi network. If null, the WiFi network will be broadcast by all Access Point capable devices.

children.name: deviceIds
children.description: List of Access Point capable device IDs to which the WiFi broadcast applies.

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/wifi/broadcasts?offset=%7Boffset%7D&limit=%7Blimit%7D&filter=%7Bfilter%7D", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: List Wifi Broadcasts
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/wifi/broadcasts"
    method: GET
    query:
      offset: "{offset}"
      limit: "{limit}"
      filter: "{filter}"
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/wifi/broadcasts?offset=%7Boffset%7D&limit=%7Blimit%7D&filter=%7Bfilter%7D", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: List Wifi Broadcasts
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/wifi/broadcasts"
    method: GET
    query:
      offset: "{offset}"
      limit: "{limit}"
      filter: "{filter}"
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
